title: BlazBlue Centralfiction

notes: Runs perfectly for me with the exceptions of videos not playing. Needs mf-install script to run. Would give it a gold rating if not for the fact that changing the in game resolution to anything other than 1080p made my game either crash on startup or start to a black screen. To fix this if you accidentally change the resolution and get the same bug, open the game on a Windows PC on the same steam account with cloud saving enabled, revert the game to 1080p then close the game making sure that the save was uploaded.
title: BlazBlue Centralfiction
